firmware.title: 11.0.9.11.IN55CB is available
firmware.description:
New version: 11.0.9.11.IN55CB

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Android security patch upgraded to May 2022

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 12AM and 6AM starting May 24th, 2022. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.

firmware.title: IN2017_13.1.0.514(EX01) is available
firmware.description:
New version: IN2017_13.1.0.514(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Updated Android security patch to 2023-08-05

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2AM and 6AM starting on September 1st, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.

firmware.title: IN2017_13.1.0.550(EX01) is available
firmware.description:
New Version Available: IN2017_13.1.0.550(EX01) 

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

Release Highlights:

• Updated Android security patch to 2024-04-05.

 Automatic Update Schedule:

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2 AM and 6 AM starting on April 28th, 2024.

Note:

Data rates may apply.

Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.
